app.title: Lunaria
app.tagline: The moon, exactly as it was.

controls.pickOnGlobe: Click the globe to choose a place
controls.selectPrompt: Spin the globe and pick your place
controls.tiltTooltip: The Moon always turns the same face to Earth, so its surface barely changes. But where and when you look changes how it tilts in the sky. When on, the Moon is shown at the angle you'd actually see from the chosen place and time. Turn it off to freely rotate the Moon.
controls.pickHint: Drag to spin · Tap to pick

presetList.birth: The moon on the day you were born
presetList.metYou: The moon on the night we met
presetList.yours: That night's moon belongs to you
presetList.sameMoon: We look up at the same moon
presetList.firstDay: The moon watching over our first day
